mapper.sql:
SELECT SUBSTR(TO1.SUBUL_YYMM,1,4) || '-' || SUBSTR(TO1.SUBUL_YYMM,5,2) || '-01' AS SUBUL_YYMM1 ,TO1.SUBUL_YYMM AS SUBUL_YYMM ,TO1.CTKEY ,TO1.LOGGRPCD ,TO1.CTKEY ||';'|| 'LOGGRPCD' ||';'|| TO1.LOGGRPCD AS LOGGRPCD_DESC ,TO1.OWKEY ,(SELECT OWNAME FROM TWORK_MST_OW OW WHERE OW.OWKEY = TO1.OWKEY) AS OWNAME ,TO1.ICKEY ,TO1.ICNAME ,(SELECT B.SPEC FROM TWORK_MST_IC B WHERE B.CTKEY = TO1.CTKEY AND B.OWKEY = TO1.OWKEY AND B.ICKEY = TO1.ICKEY) SPEC ,TO1.ACKEY ,TO1.ACNAME ,TO1.ICGRKEY ,TO1.ICGRNAME ,TO1.CARRYOVER_QTY ,TO1.INB_INVQTY ,TO1.OUT_INVQTY ,TO1.ADJ_INVQTY ,TO1.CLOSING_INVQTY ,TO1.INSERTDATE ,TO1.INSERTURKEY ,TO1.UPDATEDATE ,TO1.UPDATEURKEY FROM TWORK_INFO_IVST_SUPPLIES TO1 WHERE TO1.CTKEY = #{ctkey}
AND #{SEARCH_CONDITION}
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO TWORK_INFO_IVST_SUPPLIES ( SUBUL_YYMM, CTKEY, LOGGRPCD, OWKEY, ICKEY, ACKEY, ICNAME, ACNAME, ICGRKEY, ICGRNAME, CARRYOVER_QTY, CARRYOVER_COSTPRICE, INB_INVQTY, INB_COSTPRICE, OUT_INVQTY, OUT_COSTPRICE, REPLACE_INVQTY, REPLACE_COSTPRICE, ADJ_INVQTY, ADJ_COSTPRICE, CLOSING_INVQTY, CLOSING_COSTPRICE, INSERTDATE, INSERTURKEY, UPDATEDATE, UPDATEURKEY )( SELECT TO_CHAR((TO_DATE(#{subul_yymm} || '01', 'YYYYMMDD') + (1) * INTERVAL '1 month'), 'yyyymm') AS SUBUL_YYMM, CTKEY, LOGGRPCD, OWKEY, ICKEY, ACKEY, ICNAME, ACNAME, ICGRKEY, ICGRNAME, SUM(COALESCE(CARRYOVER_QTY, 0) + COALESCE(INB_INVQTY, 0) - COALESCE(OUT_INVQTY, 0) + COALESCE(REPLACE_INVQTY, 0) + COALESCE(ADJ_INVQTY, 0)) AS CLOSING_INVQTY , '0' , '0' , '0' , '0' , '0' , '0' , '0' , '0' , '0' ,SUM(COALESCE(carryover_qty, 0) + COALESCE(inb_invqty, 0) - COALESCE(out_invqty, 0) + COALESCE(replace_invqty, 0) + COALESCE(adj_invqty, 0)) , '0' ,#{sysdate} ,#{surkey} ,#{sysdate} ,#{surkey} FROM TWORK_INFO_IVST_SUPPLIES IVS WHERE SUBUL_YYMM = #{subul_yymm} AND OWKEY = #{owkey} AND CTKEY = #{ctkey}
GROUP BY SUBUL_YYMM, CTKEY, LOGGRPCD, OWKEY, ICKEY, ACKEY, ICNAME, ACNAME, ICGRKEY, ICGRNAME )
mapper.update: UPDATE TWORK_INFO_IVST_SUPPLIES IVS SET REPLACE_INVQTY = COALESCE(( SELECT A.CFQTY FROM TWORK_INFO_SP_HD A ,TWORK_INFO_SP_DT B ,TWORK_MST_IC C WHERE 1=1 AND A.CTKEY = IVS.CTKEY AND A.OWKEY = IVS.OWKEY AND A.WKSTATUS = '90' AND A.LOGGRPCD = IVS.LOGGRPCD AND A.SPCONFIRMDATE BETWEEN TO_CHAR(TO_DATE((IVS.SUBUL_YYMM || '01'),'YYYYMMDD') - 1,'YYYYMMDD') || '150000' AND TO_CHAR((DATE_TRUNC('month', TO_DATE(IVS.SUBUL_YYMM || '01', 'YYYYMMDD')) + INTERVAL '1 month - 1 day')::DATE, 'YYYYMMDD') || '145959' AND A.CTKEY = B.CTKEY AND A.SP_HDKEY = B.SP_HDKEY AND B.CTKEY = C.CTKEY AND B.OWKEY = C.OWKEY AND B.ICKEY = C.ICKEY AND C.ICKEY = IVS.ICKEY AND C.ICGRKEY=IVS.ICGRKEY ), 0) WHERE SUBUL_YYMM = #{subul_yymm} AND LOGGRPCD = #{loggrpcd} AND CTKEY = #{ctkey} AND OWKEY = #{owkey}
